name: PancakeSwap
analysis: CAKE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 64% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $1.3770, stop $1.2010, target $1.5338 (0.89:1) — then trail it.
